description: Legacy API response {results:[{firstName,lastName,emailAddress,birthYear}]} -> new API {users:[{name:{first,last}, contact:{email}, birth_year}]}
prompt_hint: Rename the top-level key 'results' to 'users'. For each record, restructure: firstName/lastName go into a nested name object ({first, last}); emailAddress goes into a nested contact object as 'email'; birthYear becomes birth_year (snake_case). All values unchanged.
